name: Lynas Rare Earths Limited
description: Lynas Rare Earths Limited is the world’s only significant producer of separated rare earth materials outside of China. The company operates the high-grade Mt Weld mine and concentration plant in Western Australia and a major refining facility in Kuantan, Malaysia. Lynas specializes in the extraction and processing of rare earth minerals, primarily Neodymium and Praseodymium (NdPr), which are essential components for high-strength permanent magnets used in electric vehicles, wind turbines, and advanced electronics. As a key player in the global critical minerals supply chain, Lynas is expanding its industrial footprint with a new processing facility in Kalgoorlie and planned operations in the United States.
